prompt:
A cinematic anime-style character promotional poster titled “Time Fragments”, designed in a vertical 9:16 key visual composition. The upper half features a large, softly glowing silhouette of an anime girl’s face formed from intricate clock gears, floating time particles, and soft golden dust. The silhouette appears delicate, semi-transparent, and slightly fragmented, as if made of broken moments in time.
Inside the silhouette, use double exposure storytelling: layered memories transitioning from childhood to present to future — scenes like a young girl running in sunlight, a quiet emotional moment, and a distant hopeful future — all blended seamlessly with floating clock hands, drifting numbers, and light trails. The composition feels nostalgic and meaningful.
The lower section shows the full-body anime girl walking forward gently, symbolizing moving through time. She wears a modern elegant outfit with subtle vintage elements, with soft fabric movement. Her expression is calm but determined.
A thin glowing timeline-like energy line connects the silhouette above to the character below, resembling a flowing stream of time.
Color composition: left side warm golden tones and soft sunset hues (past), right side cool blue tones and soft light gradients (future), blending smoothly in the center.
Edges are soft, painterly, fading into white negative space, with an ethereal anime aesthetic. Ultra-detailed, cinematic lighting, depth of field, soft glow, 4K resolution, emotional storytelling, highly detailed textures.
